pr_text:
## Title: Fix integer overflow in turbo encoder buffer offset calculation

### Summary
Fix integer overflow in `threegpplte_turbo_encoder_sse()` that occurs when processing large input blocks. The function calculates `input_length_bits = input_length_bytes << 3` using an `unsigned short` variable, which overflows for inputs larger than 8191 bytes. This overflow leads to incorrect buffer offset calculations (`input_length_bits * 3`), causing out-of-bounds memory writes during turbo encoding and p
